---
title: "Academic Experience"
---

## Research and Teaching Profile

My academic work has focused on probability, statistical mechanics, and machine learning, with sustained experience in both teaching and research environments.

## Institutions and Roles

- **Universidad de Buenos Aires**: Professor and researcher in mathematics and statistics.
- **CONICET**: Research activities in probability and statistical mechanics.
- **Universidad de San Andres**: Teaching and research roles linked to applied quantitative methods.
- **Leiden University**: PhD research in mathematics.

## Topics I Worked On

- Probability theory and stochastic processes
- Statistical mechanics and complex systems
- Foundations of machine learning
- Advanced quantitative modeling for scientific and applied contexts

## Thesis and Supervision

I completed my PhD in Mathematics at Leiden University under the supervision of Frank den Hollander and Roberto Fernandez.

## Back to Home

Return to the [main page](index.md).
